critical_notes:
- Gross margin at 24.2% is 10.4 pts below L3M average — margin compression
- EBITDA margin at 16.2% declined 7.2 pts vs L3M — operating cost pressure
- Net loss of $28,002 — profitability concern
- Year-over-year revenue is up 32% vs March 2025
- 11 customers classified as 'At Risk' with $360,056 in historical revenue
- 67 customers are Hibernating (no recent purchases)
- 2 of top 10 customers have GP margin below 15%: Volvo Group NA, Inc, Kenworth of  Louisiana
- 13 customers are overdue to order ($779,317 L12M at risk): Rush Enterprises, Inc. - Billing, CBS Parts, Western Trailers
- 25 customers have cross-sell opportunities across product categories
- 20 customers flagged with multiple attention signals: Cassens - Aurora, Bremskerl CV, RWC Group - Phoenix
- 241 orders placed in L3M (avg $12,614 per order)
- 24 new customers acquired in L3M: Ace Bus Charter, Bluegrass InternationaL Trucks, Cascade Friction   (GD)
- L3M order volume (241) is above L12M quarterly average (204)
- Order backlog of $1,738,818 across 73 orders (avg age: 38 days)
- $781,569 (45%) of backlog expected to ship within 30 days
action_items:
- Review product mix and pricing; identify margin erosion sources
- Review operating expenses for cost reduction opportunities
- Develop plan to return to profitability
- Prioritize outreach to 11 At Risk customers before they churn
- Run targeted reactivation campaign for top Hibernating accounts
- Review pricing strategy for low-margin key accounts
- Contact 13 overdue customers — top accounts: Rush Enterprises, Inc. - Billing, CBS Parts, Western Trailers
- Top cross-sell targets: Kenworth of  Louisiana (missing: Rotors, ADB, Hubs); Volvo Group NA, Inc (missing: Rotors, ADB, Hubs); Washington Foundries (missing: Rotors, ADB, Hubs)
